SEARCH
Package dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon

Class NukeLexicon

java.lang.Object
dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.NukeLexicon
public class NukeLexicon extends Object
NukeLexicon - Advanced i18n and MiniMessage Text API. This is the main core class of the library.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    close()
    Closes the Adventure audiences to prevent memory leaks.
    net.kyori.adventure.platform.bukkit.BukkitAudiences

    Gets the Adventure Audiences manager for dispatching MiniMessage components.
    String

    Gets the default prefix used as a safe fallback if missing from the config.

    Gets the default fallback language used when a player's locale is not found.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
      Initializes the NukeLexicon library with automatic metadata detection. It retrieves the version and prefix directly from the provided plugin instance. Fallback language defaults to "en_US".
      Parameters:
      plugin - The instance of the user plugin (e.g., 'this').

    • init

      public static void init(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, String fallbackLanguage, String defaultPrefix)
      Initializes the NukeLexicon library. This must be called inside the user plugin's onEnable() method.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The instance of the user plugin (e.g., 'this').
      fallbackLanguage - The default fallback language (e.g., "en_US").
      defaultPrefix - The emergency prefix if missing in config.

    • close

      public static void close()
      Closes the Adventure audiences to prevent memory leaks. This should be called inside the user plugin's onDisable() method.

    • getInstance

      public static NukeLexicon getInstance()
      Gets the global NukeLexicon instance.
      Returns:
      The NukeLexicon API instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the library hasn't been initialized yet.

    • getPlugin

      public org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin getPlugin()
      Gets the Bukkit Plugin instance hosting this library.
      Returns:
      The Plugin instance.

    • getAdventure

      public net.kyori.adventure.platform.bukkit.BukkitAudiences getAdventure()
      Gets the Adventure Audiences manager for dispatching MiniMessage components.
      Returns:
      The BukkitAudiences instance.

    • getLanguageManager

      public LanguageConfigManager getLanguageManager()
      Gets the language manager handling locales and translation files.
      Returns:
      The LanguageConfigManager instance.

    • getFallbackLanguage

      public String getFallbackLanguage()
      Gets the default fallback language used when a player's locale is not found.
      Returns:
      The language code (e.g., "en_US").

    • getDefaultPrefix

      public String getDefaultPrefix()
      Gets the default prefix used as a safe fallback if missing from the config.
      Returns:
      The formatted prefix string.
